name.value: Reasons why over 70 million people and businesses have signed up for Proton

value.value: Reasons why over 70 million people and businesses have signed up for Proton

name.value: Proton uses zero-access encryption wherever possible. This helps ensure nobody, not even Proton, can decrypt, access, or share any of your personal information. We don’t serve ads and can’t share your data with advertisers.

value.value: Proton uses zero-access encryption wherever possible. This helps ensure nobody, not even Proton, can decrypt, access, or share any of your personal information. We don’t serve ads and can’t share your data with advertisers.

name.value: Proton is based in Switzerland. This means all user data is protected by strict Swiss privacy laws. We are a neutral and safe haven for your personal data, committed to defending your freedom.

value.value: Proton is based in Switzerland. This means all user data is protected by strict Swiss privacy laws. We are a neutral and safe haven for your personal data, committed to defending your freedom.

name.value: Proton services are so easy to use that anyone can use them. Easy Switch lets you instantly import and encrypt your data from Google or other services with a single click.

value.value: Proton services are so easy to use that anyone can use them. Easy Switch lets you instantly import and encrypt your data from Google or other services with a single click.

name.value: Proton was founded by scientists, and we believe in research, peer review, and transparency. All our apps are open source and independently audited so that anyone can use them, inspect them, and trust them.

value.value: Proton was founded by scientists, and we believe in research, peer review, and transparency. All our apps are open source and independently audited so that anyone can use them, inspect them, and trust them.

name.value: Proton’s core values include integrity and always doing the right thing. Freedom, privacy, and security are deeply held beliefs that we will defend at any cost. That’s why we continue to provide free services for a better society.

value.value: Proton’s core values include integrity and always doing the right thing. Freedom, privacy, and security are deeply held beliefs that we will defend at any cost. That’s why we continue to provide free services for a better society.

name.value: Proton is more than just a company. It is a movement of millions of volunteers, contributors, and users committed to a better internet that respects and protects individual rights by default.

value.value: Proton is more than just a company. It is a movement of millions of volunteers, contributors, and users committed to a better internet that respects and protects individual rights by default.

name.value: Our story begins at CERN, where the web was born

value.value: Our story begins at CERN, where the web was born

name.value: Proton was founded in 2014 by scientists who met at CERN and united over a shared vision of a more secure and private internet. We are scientists, engineers, and specialists working to protect civil liberties online.

value.value: Proton was founded in 2014 by scientists who met at CERN and united over a shared vision of a more secure and private internet. We are scientists, engineers, and specialists working to protect civil liberties online.

name.value: We believe a better world starts with privacy

value.value: We believe a better world starts with privacy

name.value: Proton is building a better internet where privacy is the default and where you are in control. Join the fight for privacy and protect your data with Proton’s privacy-first online services.

value.value: Proton is building a better internet where privacy is the default and where you are in control. Join the fight for privacy and protect your data with Proton’s privacy-first online services.

name.value: Use Proton's zero-access encryption and end-to-end encryption to secure your business.

value.value: Use Proton's zero-access encryption and end-to-end encryption to secure your business.

name.value: In addition to millions of individuals, Proton also secures over 10,000 enterprises, including many of the world’s largest public and private organizations. Learn how our enterprise solutions help organizations prevent data breaches and comply with data protection and privacy laws.

value.value: In addition to millions of individuals, Proton also secures over 10,000 enterprises, including many of the world’s largest public and private organizations. Learn how our enterprise solutions help organizations prevent data breaches and comply with data protection and privacy laws.
